    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    ElementCreationCommand
    Sealed interface common to all element-creation commands.
    Classes in ca.mcscert.jpipe.commands.creation that implement ElementView
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    CreateAbstractSupport
    Creates an AbstractSupport inside a template.
    final class 
    CreateConclusion
    Creates a Conclusion inside a justification or template.
    final class 
    CreateEvidence
    Creates an Evidence inside a justification.
    final class 
    CreateStrategy
    Creates a Strategy inside a justification.
    final class 
    CreateSubConclusion

  • Uses of ElementView in ca.mcscert.jpipe.model.elements

    Subinterfaces of ElementView in ca.mcscert.jpipe.model.elements
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    CommonElement
    Sealed interface for elements that can appear in both justifications and templates.
    interface 
    JustificationElement
    Sealed root of the element hierarchy.
    Classes in ca.mcscert.jpipe.model.elements that implement ElementView
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final record 
    AbstractSupport
    A placeholder element in a template, to be substituted when the template is implemented.
    final class 
    Conclusion
    The top-level conclusion that a justification aims to establish.
    final record 
    Evidence
    A leaf evidence element supporting a strategy.
    final class 
    Strategy
    A reasoning strategy connecting evidence to a conclusion.
    final class 
    SubConclusion
    An intermediate conclusion within a justification.

  • Uses of ElementView in ca.mcscert.jpipe.operators

    Classes in ca.mcscert.jpipe.operators that implement ElementView
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final record 
    SourcedElement
    Pairs a JustificationElement with the model it was taken from and its original source location, so merge functions can inspect the element in its original context and forward the location to creation commands.
    Methods in ca.mcscert.jpipe.operators with parameters of type ElementView
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    EquivalenceRelation.areEquivalent(ElementView a, ElementView b)
    Returns true if a and b should be merged into the same result element.
